sentences.en: I have a happy family.
sentences.cn: 我有一个幸福的家庭。

sentences.en: There are four people in my family.
sentences.cn: 我家有四口人。

sentences.en: My father is a doctor.
sentences.cn: 我爸爸是一名医生。

sentences.en: My mother is a teacher.
sentences.cn: 我妈妈是一名教师。

sentences.en: I have a little sister.
sentences.cn: 我有一个小妹妹。

sentences.en: She is only five years old.
sentences.cn: 她只有五岁。

sentences.en: We love each other very much.
sentences.cn: 我们彼此非常相爱。

questions.q: How many people are there in the family? ______ (数字英文).
What is the father? He is a ______.
How old is the sister? She is ______ years old.

sentences.en: I get up at six thirty every morning.
sentences.cn: 我每天早上六点半起床。

sentences.en: I go to school by bike.
sentences.cn: 我骑自行车去上学。

sentences.en: Classes begin at eight o'clock.
sentences.cn: 八点开始上课。

sentences.en: I like English and music best.
sentences.cn: 我最喜欢英语和音乐。

sentences.en: At noon I have lunch at school.
sentences.cn: 中午我在学校吃午饭。

sentences.en: School is over at four in the afternoon.
sentences.cn: 下午四点放学。

sentences.en: Then I go home and do my homework.
sentences.cn: 然后我回家做作业。

questions.q: When does he get up? At six ______.
How does he go to school? By ______.
What subject does he like best? ______ and music.
questions.tip: I like English and music best.

sentences.en: I like healthy food very much.
sentences.cn: 我非常喜欢健康食品。

sentences.en: For breakfast, I eat eggs and bread.
sentences.cn: 早餐我吃鸡蛋和面包。

sentences.en: I drink a glass of milk every day.
sentences.cn: 我每天喝一杯牛奶。

sentences.en: Fruit and vegetables are good for us.
sentences.cn: 水果和蔬菜对我们有好处。

sentences.en: I don't eat too much junk food.
sentences.cn: 我不吃太多垃圾食品。

sentences.en: Water is better than cola.
sentences.cn: 水比可乐更好。

sentences.en: Good food keeps us healthy and strong.
sentences.cn: 好的食物让我们健康强壮。

questions.q: What does he eat for breakfast? Eggs and ______.
What is good for us? Fruit and ______.
questions.tip: Fruit and vegetables are good for us.

questions.q: What is better than cola? ______.

sentences.en: I have a lovely pet dog.
sentences.cn: 我有一只可爱的宠物狗。

sentences.en: Its name is Lucky.
sentences.cn: 它的名字叫 Lucky。

sentences.en: Lucky has short brown hair.
sentences.cn: Lucky 有一身棕色的短毛。

sentences.en: It likes running and playing with a ball.
sentences.cn: 它喜欢跑步和玩球。

sentences.en: Every evening I take it for a walk.
sentences.cn: 每天傍晚我带它去散步。

sentences.en: Lucky is my good friend.
sentences.cn: Lucky 是我的好朋友。

sentences.en: I love it very much.
sentences.cn: 我非常爱它。

questions.q: What is the dog's name? ______.
What colour is its hair? ______.
When does he walk the dog? Every ______.
questions.tip: Every evening I take it for a walk.

sentences.en: The weather is different in four seasons.
sentences.cn: 四季的天气各不相同。

sentences.en: In spring, it is warm and windy.
sentences.cn: 春天温暖多风。

sentences.en: In summer, it is hot and sunny.
sentences.cn: 夏天炎热晴朗。

sentences.en: In autumn, it is cool and dry.
sentences.cn: 秋天凉爽干燥。

sentences.en: In winter, it is cold and it often snows.
sentences.cn: 冬天寒冷，经常下雪。

sentences.en: I like spring best.
sentences.cn: 我最喜欢春天。

sentences.en: The flowers are beautiful in spring.
sentences.cn: 春天花儿很美。

questions.q: How is the weather in summer? Hot and ______.
What season does he like best? ______.
What often happens in winter? It often ______.

sentences.en: My hobby is reading books.
sentences.cn: 我的爱好是读书。

sentences.en: I read for about an hour every day.
sentences.cn: 我每天读大约一个小时。

sentences.en: I like stories about animals and heroes.
sentences.cn: 我喜欢关于动物和英雄的故事。

sentences.en: Books teach me a lot of new things.
sentences.cn: 书教会我许多新知识。

sentences.en: On weekends, I often go to the library.
sentences.cn: 周末我常去图书馆。

sentences.en: Reading makes me happy.
sentences.cn: 阅读让我快乐。

sentences.en: It is my favourite thing to do.
sentences.cn: 这是我最喜欢做的事。

questions.q: What is his hobby? ______ books.
How long does he read every day? About an ______.
Where does he go on weekends? To the ______.

sentences.en: Ann is my best friend.
sentences.cn: Ann 是我最好的朋友。

sentences.en: She is a tall and kind girl.
sentences.cn: 她是个高个子、善良的女孩。

sentences.en: We are in the same class.
sentences.cn: 我们在同一个班。

sentences.en: She is good at maths and often helps me.
sentences.cn: 她数学很好，常帮助我。

sentences.en: We play games together after school.
sentences.cn: 放学后我们一起玩游戏。

sentences.en: We share our happiness and problems.
sentences.cn: 我们分享快乐与烦恼。

sentences.en: I am glad to have such a good friend.
sentences.cn: 有这样一个好朋友我很高兴。

questions.q: Who is the writer's best friend? ______.
What is Ann good at? ______.
When do they play games? ______ school.

sentences.en: Last Sunday my family went to the zoo.
sentences.cn: 上周日我们全家去了动物园。

sentences.en: The weather was fine and warm.
sentences.cn: 天气晴朗温暖。

sentences.en: We saw many kinds of animals there.
sentences.cn: 我们在那里看到了许多种动物。

sentences.en: The monkeys were funny and clever.
sentences.cn: 猴子们又有趣又聪明。

sentences.en: A big elephant ate a lot of bananas.
sentences.cn: 一头大象吃了很多香蕉。

sentences.en: At noon we had a picnic under a tree.
sentences.cn: 中午我们在树下野餐。

sentences.en: We took many photos and had a great time.
sentences.cn: 我们拍了很多照片，玩得很开心。

sentences.en: I will never forget that happy day.
sentences.cn: 我永远不会忘记那快乐的一天。

questions.q: Where did the family go? To the ______.
How was the weather? Fine and ______.
questions.tip: The weather was fine and warm.

questions.q: What did the elephant eat? A lot of ______.

sentences.en: Yesterday was my thirteenth birthday.
sentences.cn: 昨天是我十三岁生日。

sentences.en: My parents held a party for me.
sentences.cn: 父母为我办了一个聚会。

sentences.en: Many of my friends came to my home.
sentences.cn: 我的许多朋友来到我家。

sentences.en: My mother made a big chocolate cake.
sentences.cn: 妈妈做了一个大巧克力蛋糕。

sentences.en: We sang, danced and played games.
sentences.cn: 我们唱歌、跳舞、做游戏。

sentences.en: I got a lot of nice presents.
sentences.cn: 我收到了许多漂亮的礼物。

sentences.en: Everyone was very happy that evening.
sentences.cn: 那天晚上大家都很开心。

sentences.en: It was the best birthday in my life.
sentences.cn: 那是我一生中最棒的生日。

questions.q: How old was the writer? ______ (数字).
What did the mother make? A chocolate ______.
How did everyone feel? Very ______.

sentences.en: It rained heavily last Friday.
sentences.cn: 上周五雨下得很大。

sentences.en: I forgot to bring my umbrella.
sentences.cn: 我忘了带伞。

sentences.en: After school, I had to wait at the gate.
sentences.cn: 放学后，我不得不在校门口等着。

sentences.en: Suddenly, my friend Tom came to me.
sentences.cn: 突然，我的朋友 Tom 走过来。

sentences.en: He shared his umbrella with me.
sentences.cn: 他和我一起打伞。

sentences.en: We walked home together in the rain.
sentences.cn: 我们在雨中一起走回家。

sentences.en: I was wet but very thankful.
sentences.cn: 我淋湿了，但很感激。

sentences.en: A good friend helps you in trouble.
sentences.cn: 好朋友会在你困难时帮助你。

questions.q: How was the rain? It rained ______.
What did the writer forget? His ______.
Who helped him? His friend ______.
questions.tip: my friend Tom came to me

sentences.en: Last weekend I helped my mother cook.
sentences.cn: 上周末我帮妈妈做饭。

sentences.en: First, we washed the vegetables carefully.
sentences.cn: 首先，我们仔细地洗菜。

sentences.en: Then my mother cut the meat into pieces.
sentences.cn: 然后妈妈把肉切成块。

sentences.en: I was learning to fry eggs.
sentences.cn: 我在学煎鸡蛋。

sentences.en: At first the eggs were a little burnt.
sentences.cn: 起初鸡蛋有点糊了。

sentences.en: But I tried again and did better.
sentences.cn: 但我又试了一次，做得好多了。

sentences.en: We enjoyed the dinner we made.
sentences.cn: 我们享用了自己做的晚饭。

sentences.en: Cooking is not as easy as I thought.
sentences.cn: 做饭没有我想的那么容易。

questions.q: Who did the writer help? His ______.
What did the writer learn to do? ______ eggs.
Were the first eggs good? No, they were a little ______.
questions.tip: the eggs were a little burnt

sentences.en: Our class had a football match yesterday.
sentences.cn: 昨天我们班有一场足球赛。

sentences.en: We played against Class Three.
sentences.cn: 我们对阵三班。

sentences.en: The other team was really strong.
sentences.cn: 对方队伍很强。

sentences.en: In the first half, we lost two goals.
sentences.cn: 上半场我们丢了两个球。

sentences.en: Our teacher told us not to give up.
sentences.cn: 老师叫我们不要放弃。

sentences.en: In the second half, we scored three times.
sentences.cn: 下半场我们进了三个球。

sentences.en: At last, we won the game three to two.
sentences.cn: 最后我们以三比二赢得了比赛。

sentences.en: Team work made our success possible.
sentences.cn: 团队合作让我们取得了成功。

questions.q: Who did they play against? Class ______.
What did the teacher say? Not to ______ up.
What was the final score? Three to ______.
questions.tip: won the game three to two

sentences.en: During the holiday, I visited my grandpa.
sentences.cn: 假期里，我去看望了爷爷。

sentences.en: He lives in a small village.
sentences.cn: 他住在一个小村庄里。

sentences.en: The air there was fresh and clean.
sentences.cn: 那里的空气清新洁净。

sentences.en: Grandpa was working in his garden.
sentences.cn: 爷爷正在他的园子里干活。

sentences.en: He grew many kinds of vegetables.
sentences.cn: 他种了很多种蔬菜。

sentences.en: I helped him water the plants.
sentences.cn: 我帮他给植物浇水。

sentences.en: In the evening, we watched the stars.
sentences.cn: 晚上，我们一起看星星。

sentences.en: Life in the countryside is peaceful.
sentences.cn: 乡村生活很宁静。

questions.q: Where does grandpa live? In a small ______.
How was the air there? Fresh and ______.
What did the writer help with? ______ the plants.

sentences.en: Yesterday afternoon I lost my key.
sentences.cn: 昨天下午我丢了钥匙。

sentences.en: I looked for it everywhere but failed.
sentences.cn: 我到处找都没找到。

sentences.en: I was worried because I couldn't get in.
sentences.cn: 我很着急，因为进不了门。

sentences.en: Then I remembered my morning walk.
sentences.cn: 然后我想起了早上的散步。

sentences.en: I went back to the park to look.
sentences.cn: 我回到公园去找。

sentences.en: Luckily, the key was under a bench.
sentences.cn: 幸运的是，钥匙就在长椅下面。

sentences.en: I felt so happy to find it again.
sentences.cn: 重新找到它我太高兴了。

sentences.en: Now I always keep my key carefully.
sentences.cn: 现在我总是小心保管钥匙。

questions.q: What did the writer lose? His ______.
Why was he worried? He couldn't get ______.
Where was the key? Under a ______.
questions.tip: the key was under a bench

sentences.en: Everyone has a dream about the future.
sentences.cn: 每个人都有对未来的梦想。

sentences.en: I want to be a doctor when I grow up.
sentences.cn: 长大后我想成为一名医生。

sentences.en: Doctors help sick people get better.
sentences.cn: 医生帮助病人康复。

sentences.en: To reach my dream, I must study hard now.
sentences.cn: 为了实现梦想，我现在必须努力学习。

sentences.en: I will learn more about science and biology.
sentences.cn: 我将学习更多科学和生物知识。

sentences.en: I am going to read many medical books.
sentences.cn: 我打算读很多医学书籍。

sentences.en: I believe my dream will come true one day.
sentences.cn: 我相信总有一天梦想会实现。

sentences.en: Hard work is the key to success.
sentences.cn: 努力是成功的关键。

questions.q: What does the writer want to be? A ______.
questions.tip: I want to be a doctor

questions.q: What must he do now? Study ______.
What is the key to success? Hard ______.
questions.tip: Hard work is the key to success.

sentences.en: The summer holiday is coming soon.
sentences.cn: 暑假很快就要到了。

sentences.en: I have made a plan for it.
sentences.cn: 我为它做了一个计划。

sentences.en: First, I am going to finish my homework.
sentences.cn: 首先，我打算完成作业。

sentences.en: Then I will travel to Beijing with my parents.
sentences.cn: 然后我要和父母去北京旅行。

sentences.en: We are going to visit the Great Wall.
sentences.cn: 我们打算去参观长城。

sentences.en: I hope I can take many beautiful photos.
sentences.cn: 我希望能拍很多漂亮的照片。

sentences.en: I will also help my mother with the housework.
sentences.cn: 我还会帮妈妈做家务。

sentences.en: I am sure it will be a wonderful holiday.
sentences.cn: 我确信这将是一个美妙的假期。

questions.q: What holiday is coming? The summer ______.
Where will they travel to? ______.
What will they visit? The Great ______.

sentences.en: Computers have changed our lives a lot.
sentences.cn: 电脑极大地改变了我们的生活。

sentences.en: People use them to work and study.
sentences.cn: 人们用它们工作和学习。

sentences.en: I have learned much from the Internet.
sentences.cn: 我从网上学到了很多。

sentences.en: We can find information in a few seconds.
sentences.cn: 我们几秒钟就能找到信息。

sentences.en: However, some students play too many games.
sentences.cn: 然而，有些学生玩太多游戏。

sentences.en: This is bad for their eyes and studies.
sentences.cn: 这对他们的眼睛和学习有害。

sentences.en: We should use computers in a proper way.
sentences.cn: 我们应当以正确的方式使用电脑。

sentences.en: Technology should serve us, not control us.
sentences.cn: 科技应当服务我们，而不是控制我们。

questions.q: What has changed our lives? ______.
What have they learned from? The ______.
What is bad for eyes? Playing too many ______.

sentences.en: The environment around us is very important.
sentences.cn: 我们周围的环境非常重要。

sentences.en: But it is getting worse these years.
sentences.cn: 但这些年它正变得越来越糟。

sentences.en: Rivers that were clean are now dirty.
sentences.cn: 曾经清澈的河流如今变脏了。

sentences.en: We must do something before it is too late.
sentences.cn: 我们必须在为时已晚之前采取行动。

sentences.en: We should not throw rubbish everywhere.
sentences.cn: 我们不应到处乱扔垃圾。

sentences.en: If everyone plants a tree, the earth will be greener.
sentences.cn: 如果每个人都种一棵树，地球会更绿。

sentences.en: Saving water and paper also helps a lot.
sentences.cn: 节约水和纸也很有帮助。

sentences.en: Let's work together to protect our home.
sentences.cn: 让我们一起保护我们的家园。

questions.q: How is the environment getting? ______.
What shouldn't we throw everywhere? ______.
What will make the earth greener? Planting a ______.

sentences.en: Dear Peter, how are you these days?
sentences.cn: 亲爱的 Peter，你最近怎么样？

sentences.en: I have not written to you for a long time.
sentences.cn: 我很久没给你写信了。

sentences.en: A lot of things have happened at my school.
sentences.cn: 我的学校发生了许多事。

sentences.en: We have started a new English club.
sentences.cn: 我们成立了一个新的英语社团。

sentences.en: Since then, my spoken English has improved.
sentences.cn: 从那以后，我的口语提高了。

sentences.en: Next month we are going to have a show.
sentences.cn: 下个月我们将有一场演出。

sentences.en: I hope you can come and join us.
sentences.cn: 我希望你能来加入我们。

sentences.en: Please write back soon. Yours, Li Ming.
sentences.cn: 请尽快回信。你的，李明。

questions.q: Who is the letter to? ______.
What club have they started? A new ______ club.
What has improved? His spoken ______.

sentences.en: Good health is more important than anything.
sentences.cn: 健康比什么都重要。

sentences.en: To stay healthy, we should eat well.
sentences.cn: 为了保持健康，我们应当吃得好。

sentences.en: We ought to have enough sleep every night.
sentences.cn: 我们每晚应当有充足的睡眠。

sentences.en: We must take exercise regularly.
sentences.cn: 我们必须经常锻炼。

sentences.en: Running and swimming are good choices.
sentences.cn: 跑步和游泳是不错的选择。

sentences.en: We should not stay up too late.
sentences.cn: 我们不应熬夜太晚。

sentences.en: Washing hands often keeps illness away.
sentences.cn: 勤洗手能远离疾病。

sentences.en: A healthy body brings a happy life.
sentences.cn: 健康的身体带来幸福的生活。

questions.q: What is more important than anything? Good ______.
How often should we exercise? ______.
What keeps illness away? Washing ______ often.
questions.tip: Washing hands often keeps illness away

sentences.en: Autumn is the season that I like best.
sentences.cn: 秋天是我最喜欢的季节。

sentences.en: The weather in autumn is cool and comfortable.
sentences.cn: 秋天的天气凉爽舒适。

sentences.en: The leaves turn yellow and fall down slowly.
sentences.cn: 树叶变黄，慢慢落下。

sentences.en: Farmers are busy because it is harvest time.
sentences.cn: 农民们很忙，因为这是收获的季节。

sentences.en: They gather the crops that they have grown.
sentences.cn: 他们收割自己种下的庄稼。

sentences.en: I often go hiking with my family in autumn.
sentences.cn: 秋天我常和家人去远足。

sentences.en: The golden fields look really beautiful.
sentences.cn: 金色的田野看起来真美。

sentences.en: Autumn always fills my heart with joy.
sentences.cn: 秋天总让我心中充满喜悦。

questions.q: Which season does the writer like best? ______.
questions.tip: Autumn is the season that I like best

questions.q: What colour do the leaves turn? ______.
Why are farmers busy? It is ______ time.

sentences.en: The Spring Festival is the most important festival in China.
sentences.cn: 春节是中国最重要的节日。

sentences.en: It is celebrated by people all over the country.
sentences.cn: 全国人民都庆祝它。

sentences.en: Before the festival, houses are cleaned and decorated.
sentences.cn: 节前，家家户户打扫并装饰房屋。

sentences.en: Red couplets are put on the doors for good luck.
sentences.cn: 红对联被贴在门上以求好运。

sentences.en: On New Year's Eve, families get together for a big dinner.
sentences.cn: 除夕夜，家人团聚吃年夜饭。

sentences.en: Children are given lucky money by their parents.
sentences.cn: 孩子们会收到父母给的压岁钱。

sentences.en: Fireworks light up the sky at midnight.
sentences.cn: 午夜烟花照亮天空。

sentences.en: The festival brings families closer together.
sentences.cn: 这个节日让家人更加亲近。

questions.q: What is the most important festival in China? The Spring ______.
What are put on the doors? Red ______.
questions.tip: Red couplets are put on the doors

questions.q: When do fireworks light up the sky? At ______.
questions.tip: Fireworks light up the sky at midnight

sentences.en: Yuan Longping was a famous Chinese scientist.
sentences.cn: 袁隆平是一位著名的中国科学家。

sentences.en: He is known as the father of hybrid rice.
sentences.cn: 他被誉为杂交水稻之父。

sentences.en: For many years, he worked hard in the fields.
sentences.cn: 多年来，他在田间辛勤工作。

sentences.en: His new kind of rice can grow more grain.
sentences.cn: 他培育的新稻能产出更多粮食。

sentences.en: Because of him, millions of people are fed.
sentences.cn: 因为他，数百万人得以温饱。

sentences.en: His work has helped not only China but the world.
sentences.cn: 他的工作不仅帮助了中国，也帮助了世界。

sentences.en: He once said he had a dream under the rice.
sentences.cn: 他曾说他有一个稻下乘凉的梦。

sentences.en: He will always be remembered by us.
sentences.cn: 他将永远被我们铭记。

questions.q: What was Yuan Longping? A famous ______.
What is he known as the father of? Hybrid ______.
Who has his work helped? Not only China but the ______.
questions.tip: helped not only China but the world

sentences.en: Water is one of the most important natural resources.
sentences.cn: 水是最重要的自然资源之一。

sentences.en: However, clean water is being wasted every day.
sentences.cn: 然而，干净的水每天都在被浪费。

sentences.en: In some areas, water is badly needed by people.
sentences.cn: 在一些地区，人们急需用水。

sentences.en: A lot of water can be saved in daily life.
sentences.cn: 日常生活中能节约很多水。

sentences.en: Taps should be turned off after use.
sentences.cn: 用完后应关掉水龙头。

sentences.en: Used water can be collected to clean the floor.
sentences.cn: 用过的水可以收集起来擦地。

sentences.en: If water is saved by everyone, we will have enough.
sentences.cn: 如果人人节约用水，我们就会有足够的水。

sentences.en: Remember, no water means no life.
sentences.cn: 记住，没有水就没有生命。

questions.q: What is being wasted every day? Clean ______.
What should be turned off after use? ______.
questions.tip: Taps should be turned off after use

questions.q: What does no water mean? No ______.

sentences.en: Reading is a habit that benefits us for life.
sentences.cn: 阅读是让我们受益一生的习惯。

sentences.en: Through books, we can travel to any place and time.
sentences.cn: 通过书籍，我们能穿越任何地点和时代。

sentences.en: Knowledge that we gain from reading is priceless.
sentences.cn: 从阅读中获得的知识是无价的。

sentences.en: Good books are written by wise people.
sentences.cn: 好书是由智者写成的。

sentences.en: They teach us how to think and how to live.
sentences.cn: 它们教会我们如何思考、如何生活。

sentences.en: A person who loves reading is never lonely.
sentences.cn: 热爱阅读的人从不孤独。

sentences.en: The more we read, the more we understand.
sentences.cn: 读得越多，懂得越多。

sentences.en: So let us make reading a part of our life.
sentences.cn: 所以让我们把阅读变成生活的一部分。

questions.q: Reading is a habit that benefits us for ______.
Who writes good books? ______ people.
A person who loves reading is never ______.

sentences.en: Last winter, I became a volunteer in my city.
sentences.cn: 去年冬天，我成为了城里的一名志愿者。

sentences.en: Our team helped the old people who lived alone.
sentences.cn: 我们的队伍帮助独居老人。

sentences.en: We cleaned their rooms and bought food for them.
sentences.cn: 我们打扫他们的房间，为他们买食物。

sentences.en: Some of us read newspapers to those who were blind.
sentences.cn: 我们中一些人给盲人读报纸。

sentences.en: The old people were deeply moved by our help.
sentences.cn: 老人们被我们的帮助深深感动。

sentences.en: Their warm smiles made all our work worthwhile.
sentences.cn: 他们温暖的微笑让我们的付出都值得。

sentences.en: I have learned that giving is better than taking.
sentences.cn: 我懂得了给予胜于索取。

sentences.en: I will keep helping others in the future.
sentences.cn: 将来我会继续帮助他人。

questions.q: What did the writer become? A ______.
Who did the team help? The ______ people who lived alone.
questions.tip: helped the old people who lived alone

questions.q: What is better than taking? ______.

sentences.en: One hot day, a thirsty crow was looking for water.
sentences.cn: 一个炎热的日子，一只口渴的乌鸦在找水。

sentences.en: At last it found a jug with a little water inside.
sentences.cn: 最后它发现一个罐子，里面有一点水。

sentences.en: But the water was too low for the crow to reach.
sentences.cn: 但水太低，乌鸦够不着。

sentences.en: The clever bird thought of a good idea.
sentences.cn: 这只聪明的鸟想出了一个好主意。

sentences.en: It picked up small stones one by one.
sentences.cn: 它一颗一颗地叼来小石子。

sentences.en: The stones were dropped into the jug carefully.
sentences.cn: 石子被小心地放进罐子里。

sentences.en: Slowly, the water rose to the top.
sentences.cn: 慢慢地，水升到了顶部。

sentences.en: This story tells us that wisdom beats strength.
sentences.cn: 这个故事告诉我们智慧胜过蛮力。

questions.q: What was the crow looking for? ______.
What did it drop into the jug? Small ______.
What beats strength? ______.

sentences.en: Everyone meets difficulties on the road of life.
sentences.cn: 每个人在人生路上都会遇到困难。

sentences.en: What matters is how we deal with them.
sentences.cn: 重要的是我们如何面对它们。

sentences.en: Thomas Edison failed thousands of times.
sentences.cn: 托马斯·爱迪生失败了成千上万次。

sentences.en: But he never stopped trying new ways.
sentences.cn: 但他从未停止尝试新方法。

sentences.en: Finally, the electric light was invented by him.
sentences.cn: 最终，电灯被他发明了出来。

sentences.en: His story shows that failure is the mother of success.
sentences.cn: 他的故事说明失败是成功之母。

sentences.en: When we fall down, we must stand up again.
sentences.cn: 当我们跌倒时，必须重新站起来。

sentences.en: As long as we keep going, we will win in the end.
sentences.cn: 只要坚持下去，我们终将获胜。

questions.q: Who failed thousands of times? Thomas ______.
questions.tip: Thomas Edison failed thousands of times

questions.q: What was invented by him? The electric ______.
questions.tip: the electric light was invented by him

questions.q: Failure is the mother of ______.
questions.tip: failure is the mother of success
